name: Ember Burst
desc: A concentrated burst of ember energy.

name: Ember Flicker
desc: A small, fast flicker of heat.

name: Warm Pulse
desc: Radiates warmth inward — restores HP.

name: Scorch Ring
desc: Rings the target in orbital fire.

name: Fire Veil
desc: Wraps self in fire — raises Defense for 2 turns.

name: Solar Flare
desc: Channels a memory of the sun. High damage, high cost.

name: Corona Shield
desc: Absorbs the next hit entirely.

name: Void Pulse
desc: Sends a wave through the between-space.

name: Void Flicker
desc: A brief rupture in local reality.

name: Echo Drain
desc: Drains HP from target and recovers half.

name: Cinder Veil
desc: Cloaks in fading ash — raises evasion.

name: Lantern Call
desc: Draws the target in — lowers their Speed.

name: Null Beacon
desc: A signal that erases. Ignores Defense.

name: Moss Shield
desc: Dense moss growth absorbs the next hit.

name: Root Hold
desc: Roots the target — prevents swapping for 2 turns.

name: Spore Mist
desc: Lowers target's Focus.

name: Spore Storm
desc: A dense cloud of toxic spores.

name: Verdant Pulse
desc: Channels the forest's memory — large heal.

name: Static Pulse
desc: A burst of electrical discharge.

name: Spark Nip
desc: A quick bite that carries voltage.

name: Lightning Fang
desc: Strikes at electric speed — always hits first.

name: Charge Field
desc: Builds a charge — next attack deals double.

name: Thunder Rush
desc: Full-body electrical charge. High recoil.

name: Astral Blink
desc: Shifts slightly out of phase — next attack misses.

name: Dream Dust
desc: Inflicts Sleep on the target.

name: Moonbeam
desc: A beam drawn from lunar resonance.

name: Phase Shift
desc: Fully phases out — becomes untargetable for 1 turn.
